untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparison of implied volatility differential between TWO INDICES (spread trading). The allowed indicators set contains only single-instrument volatility measures (india_vix, hvol_20). Cross-index IV differential calculation is not supported by the available indicator set. This is a multi-leg derivative strategy that cannot be expressed with single-instrument indicators.
translation_notes: Original signal requires establishing an index spread when IV differential >= 2% (0.02 decimal). Attempted proxy using india_vix as general HIGH_VOL regime trigger, but this does not capture the core logic of comparing two different index implied volatilities. The spread direction (LONG vs SHORT) is context-dependent and requires external determination of which index IV is higher.
